title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a CEO.
tagline: Your mind is the scene of the crime

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces his greatest foe yet: the Joker, who plunges Gotham into anarchy.
tagline: Welcome to a world without rules

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.
tagline: Mankind was born on Earth. It was never meant to die here

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant son.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding solace and redemption through acts of common decency.
tagline: Hope is a good thing, maybe the best of things

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, a gangster's wife, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine.
tagline: You won't know the facts until you've seen the fiction

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The history of the US from the 50s to the 70s unfolds from the perspective of an Alabama man with an IQ of 75.
tagline: Life is like a box of chocolates

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a devil-may-care soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns from mysterious rebels about the true nature of his reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Goodfellas
overview: The story of Henry Hill and his life in the mob, covering his relationship with his wife Karen Hill spanning the years.
tagline: As far back as I can remember, I've always wanted to be a gangster

title: Schindler's List
overview: Oskar Schindler is a vainglorious and greedy German businessman who becomes an unlikely humanitarian.
tagline: Whoever saves one life saves the world entire

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
overview: Gandalf and Aragorn lead the World of Men against Sauron's army to draw his gaze from Frodo and Sam as they approach Mount Doom with the One Ring.
tagline: There can be no triumph without loss. No victory without suffering. No freedom without sacrifice.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young FBI cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated and manipulative cannibal killer to help catch another serial killer.
tagline: A census taker once tried to test me. I ate his liver with some fava beans and a nice Chianti.

title: Star Wars
overview: Princess Leia is captured and held hostage by the evil Imperial forces. Luke Skywalker joins rebel forces to free her.
tagline: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....

title: Seven Samurai
overview: A poor village under attack by bandits recruits seven unemployed samurai to protect them.
tagline: The mighty warriors face the ultimate enemy - themselves

title: The Green Mile
overview: The lives of guards on Death Row are affected by one of their charges: a black man accused of child murder and rape.
tagline: He could burn you with his eyes

title: City of God
overview: In the slums of Rio, two kids' paths diverge as one struggles to become a photographer and the other a kingpin.
tagline: If you run, the beast catches you; if you stay, the beast eats you.

title: The Prestige
overview: After a tragic accident, two stage magicians engage in a battle to create the ultimate illusion while sacrificing everything they have to outwit each other.

title: Life Is Beautiful
overview: A Jewish barber in Italy protects his son from the horrors of WWII by telling him it's a game.
tagline: One man. One love. A thousand stories, but this is ours.
